commands.review_summary:
The PR routes OpenAI Codex API-key image credentials to the native OpenAI Images endpoint while keeping OAuth/token credentials on the Codex Responses image transport, with regression tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes any configured openai-codex profile through the Codex image transport and does not branch on resolved api-key mode. I did not run a live OpenAI image call.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane: the diff is a focused maintainer-labeled auth-routing fix with no blocking review finding; remaining action is normal maintainer merge or verification.

target.title: fix: route Codex image API keys through OpenAI Images
target.body:
## Summary
- route Codex API-key image auth through the native OpenAI Images API instead of the Codex Responses backend
- keep Codex OAuth and token auth on the Codex image transport
- add regression coverage for API-key-only, mixed Codex profiles, token, and OpenAI-key precedence paths
- add changelog entry

## Behavior addressed
ClawSweeper image generation on Hetzner selected an OpenAI Codex auth profile whose resolved credential was an API key, then sent it to the Codex Responses backend. That backend rejected the valid API key with 401. This patch routes resolved API-key credentials to api.openai.com image generation and reserves the Codex backend for OAuth or token credentials.

## Real environment tested
Local OpenClaw worktree with the focused OpenAI provider test harness. The original Hetzner diagnosis showed the key was valid against api.openai.com and invalid against the chatgpt.com Codex backend.

## Verification
- SHARP_IGNORE_GLOBAL_LIBVIPS=1 pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
- OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=/tmp/openclaw-openai-image-vitest.json OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 fnm exec --using v22.22.2 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-provider-openai.config.ts --run
- fnm exec --using v22.22.2 pnpm tsgo:extensions:test
- git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD
- autoreview --mode local

## Evidence after fix
- focused Vitest: 1 file passed, 54 tests passed
- extension typecheck: passed
- whitespace check: passed
- autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Not tested
No live image generation call against OpenAI Images API from this PR branch. The fix is covered at the provider auth-routing layer that selects the transport and request config.
